description.initial: An oasis, shade and water where there should be neither. Palm trees ring a clear pool and the air is cooler here. By a small fire, an old man watches you approach without surprise.
description.return: The oasis. The Hermit tends his fire, at peace with his chosen solitude.
description.atmospheric: Water trickles from a spring, creating the most beautiful sound in the desert. The shade feels like a relief.

north.blockedMessage: The forest cannot be reached from here. The terrain is impassable.

npcs.dialogue: "You look very familiar... But if I am being honest I did already expect you. Your father had the same look you do now. Desperate and certain at the same time. He sat at this fire for two nights before moving on. He left his compass behind by accident, or perhaps on purpose, I was never sure. Take it. Head south from here to the Star Observation Point. On a clear night the three groups of stars line up and point the way to the hidden cove where his boat still waits. I know because I made this same journey once. I stopped here. Some days I wonder if I was a coward. Most days I think I was wise."

dialogueConditions.text: "You found the observation point and were able to solve the puzzle. Good. The stars don't lie. Follow where they point and you will find the cove."

items.itemMessage: You hold the compass up. The needle spins, then points steadily toward the Island of Bliss.
You drink deeply from the pool. The water refreshes you body and spirit, washing away the desert's harsh touch.

interactables.name: Campfire
interactables.examineText: A small fire burns with wood that seems to come from nowhere. The Hermit has lived here long enough to know the desert's secrets, including where to find fuel.
